title: stelis convallaria
intro: Stelis convallaria, also known as the Orchid Bee Plant, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Stelis convallaria include its ability to aid in the healing of wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Stelis convallaria typically involve infusions or decoctions of the roots and leaves, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or salves.
